name: testWaitScopeGetMaskViolation
title: testWaitScopeGetMaskViolation
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetMaskViolation (ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, long errorIndex, ScopeMaskViolationData maskViolationData); // form 1
long testWaitScopeGetMaskViolation (ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, long errorIndex, frFrame frame, ScopeMaskViolationData2 maskViolationData); // form 2
description: Retrieve the data of the bit mask violations found with testWaitScopeAnalyseSignal.

parameters.name: Keyword
parameters.type: Description

parameters.name: handle
parameters.type: A unique ID

parameters.name: errorIndex
parameters.description: The number of the bit mask error for which the error description shall be returned.

parameters.name: Keyword
parameters.type: Description

parameters.name: bitField
parameters.type: field type, see ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: bitNo
parameters.type: bit number within bit field

parameters.name: errorType
parameters.type: reserved

parameters.name: bitStartTime
parameters.type: bit start in ns

parameters.name: thresholdTimeOffset
parameters.type: distance to bit start in ns

parameters.name: disturbanceTimeStart
parameters.type: distance of disturbance to bit start in ns

parameters.name: disturbanceTimeEnd
parameters.type: distance of end of disturbance to bit start in ns

parameters.name: samplePointVoltage
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point in mV

parameters.name: domVoltageCANH
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for dominant bit for signal CAN High

parameters.name: recVoltageCANH
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for recessive bit for signal CAN High

parameters.name: domVoltageCANL
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for dominant bit for signal CAN Low

parameters.name: recVoltageCANL
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for recessive bit for signal CAN Low

parameters.name: domVoltageDiff
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for dominant bit for signal CAN Diff

parameters.name: recVoltageDiff
parameters.type: voltage at sampling point for recessive bit for signal CAN Diff

parameters.name: V2_V3
parameters.type: reserved

parameters.name: thresholdVoltage
parameters.type: threshold level in mV relative to scope ground

parameters.name: Keyword
parameters.type: Description

parameters.name: bitField
parameters.type: field type, see ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: bitNo
parameters.type: bit number within bit field

parameters.name: errorType
parameters.type: reserved

parameters.name: bitStartTime
parameters.type: bit start in ns

parameters.name: disturbanceTimeStart
parameters.type: distance of disturbance to bit start in ps

parameters.name: disturbanceTimeEnd
parameters.type: distance of end of disturbance to bit start in ps

parameters.name: Vdist
parameters.type: measured voltage at the point of the maximum disturbance in mV

parameters.name: Vgiven
parameters.type: expected voltage at the point of the maximum disturbance in mV
